description_long: This is a modern bungalow situated on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained front lawn, flower beds, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a combination of hip and flat roofs, with the main section covered by a dark hip roof and secondary sections topped with green flat roofs. The property includes a driveway leading to a double garage, a fenced backyard with blossoming trees, and multiple outdoor green spaces. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private garden area, bordered by a fence and lined with flowering shrubs. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor areas, and a blend of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern bungalow with hip and flat roofs, large windows, a double garage, and landscaped front and rear gardens on a rectangular lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, hip roof, flower beds, and driveway leading to the double garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, flat roof sections, and the fenced backyard with blossoming trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private garden, rear entrance, and a row of flowering shrubs along the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side windows, and the transition between the hip and flat roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
